title: Docs Playbook feature flags
description: Opt-in toggles for deploy-time injectors and generators. Drop a features.json into docs/ and the reusable workflow reads it in place of per-feature workflow inputs. Missing keys fall through to the YAML-input default (so old repos keep working).

changelog.description: Generate docs/changelog.html from git history at deploy time.

pageMeta.description: Inject last-updated + Edit-on-GitHub links into each page footer.

references.description: Generate docs/references/index.html from docs/references/manifest.json. No-op when manifest is absent.

nav.description: Render topbar links from docs/nav.json on every page. Lints deploy-time: every *.html must appear in nav.json or navSkip; every href must resolve.

search.description: Enable client-side search via Pagefind: inject search markup, add heading IDs, build the index.

toc.description: Inject a per-page table-of-contents from h2/h3 headings inside <main>. Ensures heading ids; skips pages under 2 headings or marked <!-- @no-toc -->.

tocPlacement.description: Where the per-page TOC renders. 'inline' (default) is a banner-style block at the top of <main>; works on any layout. 'rail' is a sticky right-side panel matching the software-docs convention (React, Tailwind, Stripe, Astro Starlight defaults); requires the page to have horizontal room on the right (collapses to inline below 1024px viewport width). Only takes effect when toc=true.

codeBlocks.description: Inject hover-revealed Copy buttons + Prism syntax highlighting on <pre> blocks in <main>. Self-hosted Prism assets copied into docs/codeblocks/ at deploy. Per-page opt-out via <!-- @no-codeblocks -->. (Legacy `codeblocks` key still works as a backward-compat alias.)

callouts.description: Inject CSS for <div class="callout note|tip|warn|danger"> styled blocks. Pure CSS, no JS. Per-page opt-out via <!-- @no-callouts -->.

prevNext.description: Inject Previous/Next page navigation derived from docs/nav.json order on every page in nav. Skips pages not in nav. Per-page opt-out via <!-- @no-prev-next -->.

branding.description: Sitewide brand customisation. Any subset of keys may be set; missing keys leave the playbook's default styles in place.

logo.description: Replaces the src of every . Either a path inside docs/ (e.g. "logo.svg") or a full https:// URL. The file/URL must exist; the script does not fetch or validate.

logoAlt.description: Replaces the alt attribute on the topbar logo. Useful when the brand name differs from the default.
